productDisplayName: Puma Men's Long Logo Bermuda White Short
description: CompositionLong white bermudas made of 100% polyester, that has a lining made of 65% polyester and 35% cotton, with two insert pockets on the sides, drawstring waist with a black tape drawstring, embroidered brand logo over the left leg and long printed logo name over the right legFittingRegularWash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water Do not bleach Tumble dry at low Cool iron Do not dryclean Close all fastenings Wash and iron inside out Wash with similar colours Use detergent for colours Look good and stay comfortable this summer in these long bermudas from puma. The plain white colour is offset with the black embroidered logo and the printed logo name making this a really cool pair. Team this with a grey or black tee and flip-flops when you hit the beach next time.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers, length of 40"Height-6”, Waist – 32”
